He's fascinated by that pamphlet!
空空如也。: 他完全被那本小冊子迷住了！

He has a deadly glint in his eyes.
空空如也。: 他眼中閃著要命的光。

There's not even a magazine to read in the seatback pocket in front of you; nothing but a slightly crumpled airsick bag.
空空如也。: 你前方椅背置物袋裡連本雜誌都沒有，只有一個皺巴巴的嘔吐袋。

Boy, are these the cheap seats!
空空如也。: 天啊，這根本是廉價艙等座位嘛！

I'm sorry, sir, responds the stewardess, "you must return to your seat before I can serve you."
空空如也。: 「先生，很抱歉，」空姐回答，「您得先回座位，我才能為您服務。」

You'd rather not. Besides, the only person he wants to hear is himself!
空空如也。: 你可不想聽。反正他只想聽自己講話！

Instantly intrigued by the fascinating treatise, Ken finally leaves you alone.
空空如也。: 肯瞬間被那篇「精彩論文」吸引住，終於不再煩你了。

The question is: have those stewardesses finished serving drinks?
空空如也。: 問題是：空姐們送完飲料了嗎？

You slowly slip your hand inside the slightly sticky seatback pocket and slide out the semi-soiled airsick bag.
空空如也。: 你慢慢把手伸進有點黏黏的椅背置物袋，抽出那個半髒的嘔吐袋。

(If you didn't need it before, you need it now!)
空空如也。: （就算你之前不需要，現在也用得上了！）

Well. Things are slightly closer back here!
空空如也。: 嗯，這裡的空間可真是「親密」呢！

No way! you think to yourself. "I can't possibly fit into such a skinny place."
空空如也。: 「不會吧！」你心想，「我怎麼可能塞進這麼窄的地方。」

Well, here goes...
空空如也。: 「好吧，來吧……」

Whew!
空空如也。: 呼～

Good afternoon, ladies uh, er, gentlemen, says the cute stewardess. "I'd like to welcome you aboard Flight 1."
空空如也。: 「午安，各位女士……呃，先生們，」可愛的空姐說，「歡迎搭乘第一號班機。」

In the unlikely event of a water landing, there's no need to panic--because we'll all be dead anyway! she laughs.
空空如也。: 「萬一發生水上迫降，請不用驚慌——因為反正我們都會死！」她笑著說。

Now don't get upset, that's just a little airline humor!
空空如也。: 「別緊張，這只是航空公司的小幽默啦！」

Oh, and if during our flight those cute little yellow masks happen to drop down from their overhead compartments... why, just ignore them. Lately, those practical jokers in maintenance have been substituting nitrous oxide for the oxygen again!
空空如也。: 「對了，如果飛行途中那些可愛的小黃面罩從上方艙門掉下來……別理它們就好。最近維修部那些愛惡作劇的傢伙又把氧氣換成笑氣了！」

And remember: in case of an emergency, we women get to leave first!
空空如也。: 「還有記住：緊急狀況時，我們女士優先離開！」

Are there any questions? she asks, while leaving.
空空如也。: 「有什麼問題嗎？」她邊走邊問。

A voice crackles through the loudspeakers, "Please fasten your seatbelt and move your seatback and tray table to their fully upright and locked positions. We have just been cleared for takeoff."
空空如也。: 擴音器傳來沙沙的聲音：「請繫好安全帶，將椅背和餐桌收回並鎖定至直立位置。我們剛獲准起飛。」

The captain's voice returns, "We have reached our cruising altitude..."
空空如也。: 機長的聲音再度傳來：「我們已到達巡航高度……」

(Pretty fast takeoff, wasn't it?)
空空如也。: （起飛也太快了吧？）

...of 500 feet!
空空如也。: 「……五百英呎！」

Passengers in our rear smoking compartment may smoke 'em if you gottem.
空空如也。: 「後艙吸菸區的乘客，有菸就抽吧。」

We hope you enjoy your flight. Our ETA is approximately ten minutes. Your lovely stewardesses will be serving drinks shortly. (But that's just because we couldn't hire any taller stewardesses!)
空空如也。: 「希望您享受這趟飛行。預計十分鐘後抵達。可愛的空姐們稍後會為您送上飲料。（那是因為我們請不到比較高的空姐啦！）」

The man sitting next to you responds to the captain's lame quip with a hearty, "Har, har, har!"
空空如也。: 坐你旁邊的男人對機長那句冷笑話報以豪邁的「哈！哈！哈！」

The airplane's PA system again crackles to life, "Ladies and gentlemen, we are starting our final descent at this time."
空空如也。: 機艙廣播系統又沙沙作響：「各位女士先生，我們現在開始最後下降。」

Ok, we've landed!
空空如也。: 「好了，我們降落了！」

(That was even faster than the takeoff!)
空空如也。: （這比起飛還快！）

On behalf of the entire crew of Flight #1, we'd like to welcome you to Calwa where the local time is up!
空空如也。: 「謹代表第一號班機全體機組人員，歡迎各位蒞臨卡瓦——當地時間，到了！」

Please remain in your seats, we have some members of the local police force coming aboard to check for contraband.
空空如也。: 「請留在座位上，當地警方人員即將登機檢查違禁品。」

Something makes you believe these two are no "local police."
空空如也。: 你直覺這兩人根本不是什麼「當地警察」。

There must be some way you could escape from this airplane before it lands!
空空如也。: 一定有辦法能在飛機降落前逃離這裡！

Ah, ha! Ve ghot you again, monkey breath! shouts the KGB agent.
空空如也。: 「啊哈！又抓到你了，臭猴子！」KGB探員大吼。

Hang on, Larry. Here we go again!!
空空如也。: 「撐住，賴瑞，我們又來了！！」

Drinks? Drinks, anyone?
空空如也。: 「要飲料嗎？有人要飲料嗎？」

Hey, says the man beside you, in his too-loud voice, "I remember you: you're that guy from Lefty's Bar! I haven't seen you in a long time."
空空如也。: 「嘿，」你旁邊的男人用他過大的嗓門說，「我記得你！你是左撇子酒吧那傢伙！好久不見了。」

Let me tell you this new joke I heard...
空空如也。: 「讓我跟你講個剛聽到的新笑話……」

No way, you respond, "no jokes! All you ever told me was punch lines!"
空空如也。: 「不要，」你回答，「別說笑話了！你每次都只講笑點，鋪陳都沒有！」

Once again, the bore attempts to strike up a conversation.
空空如也。: 這個無聊鬼又想找你搭話了。

Say, I don't believe we've ever met. My name is Ken; what's yours?
空空如也。: 「對了，我們好像沒見過面。我叫肯，你呢？」

Well, Larry, what kind of work are you in?
空空如也。: 「那麼，賴瑞，你是做哪一行的？」

I'm not, you reply, "I'm recently incredibly rich."
空空如也。: 「我沒工作，」你回答，「我最近超級有錢。」

Oh.
(Well, that's one way to stifle him, Larry!)
空空如也。: （嗯，賴瑞，這招堵他嘴倒是挺有效！）

Say, Larry, I'm expecting to be wealthy soon myself, he continues. "Yep, just bought into a big, national franchise. Pretty soon I'll be rolling in it!"
空空如也。: 「對了，賴瑞，我自己也快要發財了，」他接著說，「沒錯，我剛加盟了一個全國連鎖大品牌，很快就會財源滾滾啦！」

Define "it," you think to yourself!
空空如也。: 「發財」到底是指哪方面啊？你心想！

'Great market opportunity,' this guy told me. 'Can't miss deal,' he said. 'Always a steady stream of new customers,' he says.
空空如也。: 「『大好市場機會，』這傢伙跟我說。『穩賺不賠的生意，』他說。『客源源源不絕，』他說。」

Betcha you'll never guess my new business, he concludes.
空空如也。: 「我打賭你猜不到我的新事業是什麼，」他總結道。

You win.
空空如也。: 「你贏了。」

HAIR TRANSPLANTS!
空空如也。: 「植髮手術！」

Yep, that's the ticket! You know, transplants are so easy nowadays that anybody can perform 'em, he spouts. "Even a guy like me, with nothing but a correspondence course!"
空空如也。: 「沒錯，就是這個！你知道嗎，現在植髮手術簡單到誰都能做，」他滔滔不絕，「連我這種只上過函授課程的人都行！」

You scan the aircraft for empty seats.
空空如也。: 你環顧機艙，找尋空位。

You find none!
空空如也。: 一個都沒有！

You know lil' buddy, I'm lookin' to get my first real scalp under my belt right soon now!
空空如也。: 「你知道嗎，小老弟，我很快就要拿下我的第一顆真頭皮啦！」

(Why is this creep staring above your eyes?)
空空如也。: （這變態幹嘛盯著你的髮際線看？）

I'll help you out, Larry ol' buddy. he says, opening his briefcase!
空空如也。: 「我來幫你一把，賴瑞老弟。」他邊說邊打開公事包！

Just relax. I've done this on fourteen dummies and haven't lost a one of 'em!
空空如也。: 「放輕鬆就好。我在十四個假人身上做過，一個都沒失手！」

Har, har, har!!
What a time for you to forget those complicated seat belt instructions! Maybe you could distract this guy with something...
空空如也。: 你偏偏在這時候忘了那複雜的安全帶說明！或許你可以想辦法分散這傢伙的注意力……

The red light indicates it's currently "Occupado."
空空如也。: 紅燈顯示目前「使用中」。

You are not desperate enough to use the Women's restroom. Besides, some gal has been in there for hours!
空空如也。: 你還沒絕望到要用女廁。再說，已經有個女生在裡面待了好幾個小時了！

You're not near a restroom.
空空如也。: 你現在不在廁所附近。

Who's there?
空空如也。: 「是誰啊？」

Larry; Larry Laffer.
空空如也。: 「賴瑞，賴瑞·拉夫。」

(You never were good at jokes!)
空空如也。: （你向來就不會講笑話！）

Hello, you say to the men in the smoking area, %s
空空如也。: 「你好，」你對吸菸區的男人們說，%s

Hack.
Cough.
空空如也。: 「咳嗽。」

Wheeze.
Puff, puff.
空空如也。: 呼、呼。

It's still securely closed, although the safety handle is in the open position.
空空如也。: 雖然安全把手已經扳到開啟位置，但門還是牢牢關著。

Even though the padlock is now off, the large red handle is still in the closed position.
空空如也。: 雖然掛鎖已經拿掉了，但那個大紅把手仍在關閉位置。

There are three doors here. Two are labeled "Restroom." One is labeled "DANGER -- EMERGENCY EXIT!"
空空如也。: 這裡有三扇門。兩扇標示「廁所」，一扇標示「危險——緊急出口！」

It's difficult to see with all the smoke back here, but you think you detect three doors at the rear of the plane!
空空如也。: 這裡煙霧瀰漫看不太清楚，但你隱約看到機尾有三扇門！

When the light near the restroom is lit, the restroom is currently occupied.
空空如也。: 廁所旁的燈亮著時，表示廁所目前有人使用。

The smell of stale cigarette smoke makes you fondly recall your days as a lounge lizard!
空空如也。: 那股陳年菸味讓你懷念起當「夜店浪子」的日子！

Available at your local software dealer as "Leisure Suit Larry in the Land of the Lounge Lizards!"
空空如也。: 各大軟體經銷商均有販售《休閒西裝賴瑞：夜店浪子樂園》！

Pick up a couple of copies today!
空空如也。: 今天就買幾份回家吧！

Remember, those wonderful days of yesteryear are available now, at your local software dealer as "Leisure Suit Larry in the Land of the Lounge Lizards!"
空空如也。: 記住，那段美好的往日時光，現在就在各大軟體經銷商，以《休閒西裝賴瑞：夜店浪子樂園》重現！

Be sure to pick up several copies today!
空空如也。: 今天務必多買幾份！

The other passengers stare at you with suspicious expressions, so you slide the parachute under your coat.
空空如也。: 其他乘客用懷疑的眼神盯著你看，於是你把降落傘塞進外套底下。

Ok. You carefully pour your bottle of highly flammable hair rejuvenator on the emergency exit's padlock. It makes the lock look really new!
空空如也。: 好。你小心翼翼把那瓶高度易燃的生髮水倒在緊急出口的掛鎖上，讓鎖看起來閃亮如新！

You try your best to jimmy the lock with the dull cheese knife, but for naught.
空空如也。: 你用那把鈍掉的乳酪刀拚命想撬開鎖，卻徒勞無功。

You don't have the proper equipment to do that.
空空如也。: 你沒有合適的工具可以這麼做。

(You've heard that line before!)
空空如也。: （這句台詞你聽過了！）

Cleverly, you insert the bobby pin into the safety lock. (Wouldn't you guess this is against some Federal regulation?)
空空如也。: 你機靈地把髮夾插進安全鎖裡。（你猜這大概違反了某條聯邦法規吧？）

The pin works! The door is unlocked.
空空如也。: 髮夾奏效了！門解鎖了。

With great difficulty, you push the large red handle until you feel something tear. Crossing your legs, you shove the handle a quarter-turn to the left, until it is near the word "DANGER."
空空如也。: 你費了好大力氣推那個大紅把手，直到感覺有什麼東西撕裂了。你雙腿夾緊，把把手往左轉了四分之一圈，轉到靠近「危險」這幾個字的位置。

A heavy, locked padlock on the handle prevents you from doing that.
空空如也。: 把手上一個沉重的鎖頭讓你辦不到。

It IS!
空空如也。: 就是有！

Some gal has been in that one for hours!
空空如也。: 已經有個女生在那間裡待了好幾個小時了！

There's a large red handle preventing that.
空空如也。: 有個大紅把手擋著，你辦不到。

Hey, buddy, you shout, "how's 'bout givin' me one of them coffin nails?"
空空如也。: 「嘿，老兄，」你喊道，「能不能給我一根『棺材釘』抽抽？」

(Why, Larry! You don't even smoke!)
空空如也。: （哎呀，賴瑞！你根本不抽菸的啊！）

You give the door a firm shove...
空空如也。: 你用力推了一下門……

...and the blast of the airstream tears it from its hinges!
空空如也。: ……一陣強勁的氣流猛地把門從鉸鏈上扯了下來！

You feel yourself being sucked...
空空如也。: 你感覺自己正被吸出去……
